ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audit_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit report */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Entity or organization being audited */,
  "report_number" TEXT /* Unique report number assigned to the audit */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the audit report */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the audit report was issued */,
  "avail_date" TEXT /* Date the audit report became available */,
  "confidentiality" TEXT /* Confidentiality level of the audit report (e.g., Non Confidential, Confidential) */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., Financial, Operational, Compliance) */,
  "audit_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit team conducting the audit */,
  "lead_auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead auditor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the audit (e.g., In Progress, Completed, Rejected) */,
  "finalization_date" TEXT /* Date the audit report was finalized */,
  "next_audit_date" TEXT /* Date for the next audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_reports_lead_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_auditor_id") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_reports_entity FOREIGN KEY ("entity") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_reports_audit_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_team_id") REFERENCES audit_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity or organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity or organization */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., Mission, Office, Department) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "rec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit report containing the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., Open, Implemented, Closed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the recommendation should be implemented */,
  "responsible_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person responsible for implementing the recommendation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_responsible_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_person_id") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES audit_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "implementation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each implementation status update */,
  "rec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation being tracked */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date of the implementation status update */,
  "percentage_complete" REAL /* Percentage complete of the implementation */,
  "responsible_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person responsible for the implementation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the implementation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_implementation_status_rec_id FOREIGN KEY ("rec_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("rec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_implementation_status_responsible_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_person_id") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the audit team */,
  "lead_auditor" TEXT /* Name of the lead auditor */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the audit team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team's responsibilities and expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_teams_lead_auditor FOREIGN KEY ("lead_auditor") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditors" (
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auditor */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name of the auditor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the auditor */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the auditor */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., Financial, Compliance) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the auditor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auditor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit report being assigned */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auditor being assigned */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the auditor (e.g., Lead Auditor, Team Member) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the auditor was assigned to the report */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the auditor's assignment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_assignments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES audit_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_assignments_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report file */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit report the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the file */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_files_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES audit_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the visualization belongs to */,
  "vis_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., Bar Chart, Line Graph) */,
  "vis_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the visualization was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)
